name: Backlog Dynamics (Created / Resolved / Net)
query:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', v_facts.full_date)::date AS week_start,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'backlog_created' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS created_count,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'backlog_resolved' THEN (v_facts.value * -1) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS resolved_count,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'backlog_net_growth' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS net_growth
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('backlog_created', 'backlog_resolved', 'backlog_net_growth')
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{date_range}}]]
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', v_facts.full_date)::date
ORDER BY week_start ASC
